title: FLOSS Weekly 466: Open Mainframe Project
summary:
John Mertic is Director of Program Management for ODPi, R Consortium, and Open Mainframe Project at The Linux Foundation. Len Santalucia is the Chairperson for the Linux Foundation Open Mainframe Project. The project is intended to serve as a focal point for deployment and use of the Linux OS in a mainframe computing environment.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
